'use client' import { Button } from '@gentleduck/registry-ui/button' import { Field, FieldContent, FieldDescription, FieldError, FieldGroup, FieldLabel, } from '@gentleduck/registry-ui/field' import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@gentleduck/registry-ui/select' import { zodResolver } from '@hookform/resolvers/zod' import Link from 'next/link' import { Controller, useForm } from 'react-hook-form' import { toast } from 'sonner' import { z } from 'zod' const FormSchema = z.object({ email: z.email({ error: 'Please select an email to display.', }), }) export default function SelectForm() { const form = useForm>({ resolver: zodResolver(FormSchema as any), }) function onSubmit(data: z.infer) { toast.info(

You submitted the following values:

          {JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)}
, ) } return (
( Email You can manage email addresses in your email settings. {fieldState.invalid && fieldState.error && } )} />
) }
